title: George Herald office closed on Women's Day
description: GEORGE NEWS - The George Herald office in...
bodyText:
GEORGE NEWS - The George Herald office in Ring Road, George Industria, will be closed on the public holiday this Friday, 9 August (Women's Day).


> On Monday 12 August it is business as usual. Office hours are 08:00 to 16:30.


Contact us on 044 874 2424.

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
